decision.archive_summary: Recent work focused on codex:vscode minor-GC regressions. A reusable repo smoke/eval case for GC-D2 was added under evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js, and the evals were brought back to green by widening the guarded relation set to include `continue` and adding the current-editor-after-detour live case. The user now wants to continue the same stream by expanding harder fixed regressions, specifically natural Chinese multi-turn topic-shift cases similar to GC-B.
